subject: fix(pwa): detect iOS browser variants (CriOS/FxiOS/EdgiOS) in detectBrowser
body:
iOS Chrome uses CriOS, Firefox uses FxiOS, and Edge uses EdgiOS in their
UA strings instead of Chrome/Firefox/Edg. Without detecting these, all
iOS non-Safari browsers fall through to 'safari' (their UAs contain
"Safari" but not "Chrome"), making the iOS cross-redirect in
getInstallInstructions() dead code — it checks browser !== 'safari'
which was always false on iOS.

Now iOS Chrome → 'chrome', iOS Firefox → 'firefox', iOS Edge → 'edge'.
This enables the correct flow: supportsAutoInstall → 5s diagnostic
timeout (prompt never fires on iOS) → showManualInstructions → modal
shows "Open in Safari" cross-redirect with explanation.

Tags: pwa, browser-detection, ios
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-reliability
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01AC1UWyZGqVwHGuu6SPJr72
title: detect iOS browser variants (CriOS/FxiOS/EdgiOS) in detectBrowser
